overview.description: The BondBloxx Bloomberg One Year Target Duration US Treasury ETF (XONE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is passively managed to invest in a portfolio of US Treasury securities with a target duration of one year. XONE was launched on Sep 13, 2022 and is issued by BondBloxx.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Treasury 1 Year Duration Index

data.title: ExOne Global Holdings Brings Printhead Manufacturing to Detroit, Cuts Maintenance Prices for U.S. Customers
data.text: DETROIT--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ExOne announced a series of customer-focused updates, including the start of U.S. manufacturing of its Spectra Mono-Z printhead in the Detroit area.

data.title: US Court Approved Anzu Partners Affiliate to Acquire ExOne, Leader in Digital Sand Casting, Providing Financing and Stability for Operations
data.text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--US Court approved Anzu Partners affiliate acquired ExOne, leader in digital sand casting, providing financing and stability for operations.

data.title: This once popular ETF used to hedge against inflation is now out of favor. What investors are doing now.
data.text: Hello! This is markets reporter Isabel Wang bringing you this week's ETF Wrap. In this week's edition, we take a look at inflation-protected bond ETFs.
